title: saxifraga longifolia var. aitanica
intro: Saxifraga longifolia var. aitanica is a plant species within the Saxifraga genus, commonly known as the mountain saxifrage or Aitana saxifrage. This perennial herb is native to the Iberian Peninsula and has been utilized for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and roots have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues, fever, and skin problems, offering benefits like improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, Saxifraga longifolia var. aitanica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
